Another person is paddling on a surfboard in the background.

spatial: The surfer is in the center of the frame, riding the wave. The white surfboard is under the surfer's feet. The second person is in the background, to the right of the main surfer.

visible_entities.desc: person with short dark hair, wearing a dark patterned shirt
visible_entities.action: raising left arm while submerged in water

atomic_facts.fact: A person is submerged in turbulent white water.
The person raises their left arm above the water surface.
The water surrounds the person completely.

spatial: The person is in the center of the frame, surrounded by white foamy water. The person's left arm is extended upwards, positioned above the water surface.
state_changes: Action change: Person submerged in water raises an arm, distinct from previous swimming/floating.

visible_entities.desc: person with short dark hair, wearing a dark wetsuit with maroon sleeves
white surfboard with black text logo
ocean wave with white foam and green water

atomic_facts.fact: The person is surfing on a wave.
The person is crouching on the surfboard.
The surfboard has the text 'SUN' written on it.

spatial: The person is on top of the white surfboard. The surfboard is on the surface of the green water. The white foam of the wave is behind and to the left of the person.

The surfer is crouching low on the board while riding the wave.
The wave is breaking with significant white foam behind the surfer.

spatial: The person is on top of the white surfboard. The surfboard is positioned on the face of the large ocean wave. The white foam of the breaking wave is behind and to the left of the surfer.

The surfer is standing on a white surfboard.
A large wave is breaking behind the surfer, creating white spray.

The text 'Rickygphotos.com' is displayed in the center of the screen.
